rationale.R1.6: The agent performed a thorough cleanup, improving sentence structure and wording without losing meaning.
rationale.RX.1: The agent provided some uncertainty flags but didn't consistently mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the scope of cleaning up the prose as requested.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or errors were introduced in the cleaned-up text.
rationale.RX.5: Changes weren't annotated with sources or reasons beyond minor edits.
